seoTitle: Boat Harbour vs Bobadah — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Boat Harbour vs Bobadah: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Boat Harbour and Bobadah.
heading: Boat Harbour vs Bobadah — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Boat Harbour, New South Wales and Bobadah, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Boat Harbour has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Bobadah (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Boat Harbour or Bobadah safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Boat Harbour has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Bobadah scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Boat Harbour scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Bobadah scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Boat Harbour or Bobadah?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Boat Harbour has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
